_comment: External Odoo addon dependencies for CI testing.
_usage: When a module's __manifest__.py 'depends' lists a module that is not core Odoo and not in this repo, CI will download it from the source configured below.

_types.git: Clone from a git repository. Most reliable.
_types.url: Download a zip from a direct URL. Good for Odoo App Store modules.
_types.app_store: Attempt to download from Odoo App Store (best-effort, may fail on paid modules).
